description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wardrobe cabinet with a classic design, finished in a light cream or off-white color. The front features three doors, with the central door incorporating a large vertical mirror panel, flanked by two solid doors with decorative paneling. Below the central door are two pull-out drawers with ornate handles, adding both storage and visual interest. The cabinet has a flat top surface with slightly protruding edges, and the sides are plain and unadorned. The handles and hardware are metallic, likely brass or gold-toned, and the overall construction appears to be wood or engineered wood, suitable for use in bedrooms, hallways, or even upscale urban entryways.
description: A tall, cream-colored wardrobe cabinet with three doors (one mirrored) and two drawers, featuring ornate handles and classic panel detailing.
description_view_0: The back view shows a plain, flat surface with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a smooth, unadorned panel with a slight overhang at the top.
description_view_2: The front view displays three doors (center with a mirror), two drawers, and decorative handles and paneling.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain, flat panel with a top overhang.
